title: ResearchPack
description: Document-grounded research output produced by the research stage. Every factual claim must either have at least one source or be explicitly marked as uncertain.

research_pack_id.description: Unique identifier for this research pack.

brief_id.description: ID of the ContentBrief this research pack was produced for.

research_goal.description: The research question or objective as passed from the intake stage.

findings.description: List of factual findings. Each finding must have sources or be marked is_uncertain: true.

claim.description: The factual statement extracted or synthesized from sources.

confidence.description: Confidence level in this claim based on available evidence.

sources.description: Source references supporting this claim. Must contain at least one item when is_uncertain is false.

title.description: Title or filename of the source document. Null if not available.

page.description: Page number in the source document. Null if not applicable.

quote.description: The exact quoted passage from the source that supports this claim.

is_uncertain.description: True if this claim cannot be fully supported by available sources. When true, sources may be empty.

notes.description: Optional notes about confidence, caveats, or context for this finding.

unknowns.description: List of questions or topics that could not be answered from available sources.

recommended_next_queries.description: Suggested follow-up research queries to fill gaps identified during this research pass.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this research pack was created.

status.description: Completion status of this research pack.
